title: External Link Disclaimer
text: The appearance of hyperlinks does not constitute endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense, U.S. Navy or Office of Naval Research of non-U.S. Government sites or the information, products or services contained therein. Although the U.S. Department of Defense, U.S. Navy and Office of Naval Research may or may not use these sites as additional distribution channels for Department of Defense information, it does not exercise editorial control over all of the information that you may find at these locations. Such links are provided consistent with the stated purpose of this website.
